# Documentation Request

## Summary

Describe the documentation needed.

## Document Area

- Company
- Brand
- Products
- Architecture
- Design System
- Standards
- Security
- Roadmap
- Sales
- Knowledge
- Enterprise Operating System
- Website
- Other:

## Reason

Why is this documentation needed?

## Required Content

List the topics, decisions, procedures, or references that should be included.

## Source Of Truth

Link existing documents, decisions, product specs, or evidence.

## Review Requirements

- [ ] Accuracy review.
- [ ] Security/privacy review.
- [ ] Product or business owner review.
